subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #08
subcodes.first_line: To God belongs the dominion of the king of eternity.  The spirit exalts whom it wills by its glory and abases whom it wills by its decree and gives what it wills to whomever it wills.
subcodes.first_line_orig: و لله ملکوت ملک البقاء آت و الروح یعز من یشاء بعزته و یذل من یرید بقدرته
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
